description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana sword, featuring a long, gently curved single-edged blade with a sharp point. The blade is metallic and highly polished, reflecting light along its length, and is attached to a circular handguard (tsuba) with a gold or brass finish. The handle (tsuka) is cylindrical, wrapped in a black textured material, likely ray skin or synthetic wrap, and capped with a gold or brass pommel. The tsuba is simple and functional, with no visible elaborate ornamentation. The overall design is elegant and utilitarian, suitable for both display and practical use. No sheath or scabbard is present in the images.
description: A polished, curved katana sword with a black-wrapped handle, gold guard, and no visible ornamentation or sheath.
description_view_0: The sword is seen from the tip, showing the circular guard and the black handle end-on.
description_view_1: The full length of the curved blade is visible, highlighting the polished metal, gold guard, and black handle.
description_view_2: A rear view of the sword, showing the handle and guard from the opposite side, with the blade edge barely visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side of the blade is shown, again displaying the full curve, gold guard, and black handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, black-wrapped with gold pommel
